query:
-- 1. Update Sophie's notes to record her actual end date.
--    Keep active=1 for now so this week + Tuesday work normally.
UPDATE tutors
   SET notes = CONCAT('Sophie''s last day is Tuesday May 19, 2026 (10am–1pm session, shortened). Starting Wed May 20, 2026, Mom + Grandma run school. No tutors after May 19. (Updated 2026-05-15.)')
 WHERE id = 60009 AND name = 'Sophie';

-- 2. Update the May 11 (this week) override note to reflect the real story
UPDATE tutorRosterOverride
   SET note = 'Sophie is the only tutor. This is her last week. Standing hours Mon/Thu/Fri 10–3, Tue May 19 shortened 10–1 (her final session). Wed off. Mom + Grandma take over Wed May 20 onward.'
 WHERE week_start_date = '2026-05-11';

-- 3. Update the May 18 (next week) override — only Mon + Tue have Sophie, then she's done
UPDATE tutorRosterOverride
   SET active_tutor_names_json = JSON_ARRAY('Sophie'),
       helper_names_json       = JSON_ARRAY('Mom','Grandma'),
       note = 'Sophie Mon May 18 10–3, Tue May 19 10–1 (final session). Starting Wed May 20: NO tutors — Mom + Grandma run school for the rest of the year.'
 WHERE week_start_date = '2026-05-18';

-- 4. Add a "no tutors" override row for the week of May 25 onward,
--    so the dashboard reflects the new normal cleanly.
INSERT INTO tutorRosterOverride
  (week_start_date, active_tutor_names_json, helper_names_json, note, created_at)
VALUES
  ('2026-05-25',
   JSON_ARRAY(),                       -- no active tutors
   JSON_ARRAY('Mom','Grandma'),
   'No tutors. Mom + Grandma run school. (Sophie''s last day was Tue May 19, 2026.)',
   UNIX_TIMESTAMP(NOW())*1000)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  active_tutor_names_json = VALUES(active_tutor_names_json),
  helper_names_json       = VALUES(helper_names_json),
  note                    = VALUES(note);

-- 5. Confirm everything
SELECT id, name, active, LEFT(notes, 250) AS notes
FROM tutors
WHERE id = 60009;

SELECT id, week_start_date, active_tutor_names_json, helper_names_json, LEFT(note, 300) AS note
FROM tutorRosterOverride
WHERE week_start_date >= '2026-05-11'
ORDER BY week_start_date;
